title: delphinium sylvaticum subsp. sylvaticum
intro: Delphinium sylvaticum subsp. sylvaticum, also known as Woodland Larkspur, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Woodland Larkspur is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
